# WBTC Bridge

> WBTC Bridge transfers Wrapped Bitcoin between supported blockchains while you keep wallet control; this independent dashboard compares routes, fees, timing, and token contracts.

## Key facts
- Route: source chain  destination chain
- Deposit: typically minutes
- Withdraw: may need proving/finalization
- Gas: native asset on both chains
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Verify: Use the official contracts; beware fake bridge sites

## On this page
- [What is WBTC Bridge?](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#what)
- [How bridging works](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#how)
- [Depositing to the destination](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#deposit)
- [Withdrawing back](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#withdraw)
- [Time and fees](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#fees)
- [Is WBTC Bridge safe?](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/#faq)

## App
- [WBTC Bridge dashboard](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/)
- [Open the app](https://bridge-wbtc.github.io/dashboard/)
